artPrompt: A dramatic moment of a massive sludge-tentacle snaking out through burst plumbing, sickly green and dripping, splitting into reaching coils that lash through cracked rusted pipes toward three unseen foes, bioluminescent ooze spraying from every joint. There is no plumbing it cannot reach. The branching tentacle writhes up the wide landscape frame under a bruised stormy sky. Wide 4:3 landscape, Gruul murky green and rust red, toxic menace, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Tentacle Through the Pipes
text: Target creature you control with a sludge counter on it gains reach and "This creature can block any number of creatures" until end of turn. Then it fights up to three target creatures you don't control. It reaches them through the plumbing. There is no plumbing it cannot reach.
flavorText: It came up through the kitchen drain. Then the bathroom drain. Then, somehow, the ceiling.
